overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai riding a horse through a war-torn coastal landscape. The character travels from a muddy lowland past a burning village, ascends a grassy hillside, and reaches a cliff overlooking the ocean with distant sailing ships visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy coastal lowland with scattered debris and burning village ahead

events.description: riding past broken wooden cart and fence debris scattered on the right side

agents.ego_description: riding horse at steady pace through muddy terrain toward a burning village in the distance

entered.detail: wooden buildings engulfed in flames with thick black smoke rising into the gray sky
calm water body reflecting the overcast sky along the right side of the path
broken wooden cart wheels and debris scattered on the muddy ground
dense pine trees lining the left side of the landscape

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a muddy lowland area with the camera following a samurai on horseback. The ground is wet and scattered with wooden debris and broken carts. To the right lies a calm pond, while ahead in the distance, a village burns with thick black smoke rising against the overcast sky. Pine forests line the left side as the horse trots steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside ascent with rocky outcrops

events.description: terrain transitions from muddy lowland to dry grassy hillside with tall vegetation

agents.ego_description: riding uphill through tall grass, moving past the burning village which falls behind to the left

notable_agents.action: stationary figure standing on the distant hillside observing the area

entered.detail: tall golden grass swaying in the wind covering the hillside
large moss-covered boulders scattered on the right side of the path
single windswept tree on the hilltop against the gray sky

segments.scene_description: The horse transitions from muddy terrain onto a dry grassy hillside, ascending steadily through tall golden vegetation. Rocky outcrops appear on the right, and a solitary tree stands against the sky ahead. The burning village falls behind to the left, while a distant figure can be seen standing on the hillside to the right. The terrain slopes upward as the horse continues its climb.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff edge overlooking the ocean

events.description: reaching the cliff edge revealing the vast ocean and distant sailing ships
traditional wooden sailing ships become visible through the haze on the water

agents.ego_description: reaching the cliff edge and slowing to a stop to look out over the ocean at the distant ships

entered.detail: vast expanse of dark water stretching to the horizon with gentle waves
traditional wooden sailing vessels visible through the mist and haze
steep white rocky cliffs dropping down to the water below

segments.scene_description: The horse reaches the cliff edge, revealing a breathtaking view of the ocean stretching to the horizon. Through the haze, several traditional sailing ships are visible on the water. Steep white cliffs drop down to the left, while the grassy cliff edge provides a vantage point. The burning village is now out of view behind the rider as the horse stops to survey the seascape.

events.description: camera pans left to reveal the extensive coastline and white cliffs
turning back inland reveals the burning village again in the distance with dark storm clouds above

agents.ego_description: slowly turning the horse to survey the panoramic coastal view and look back toward the inland fires

entered.detail: jagged white cliffs extending along the shoreline with waves crashing below
the burning village visible again in the inland distance with flames and smoke

segments.scene_description: From the cliff top, the camera pans to reveal the dramatic coastline with jagged white cliffs extending into the distance. The horse turns slowly, showing the panoramic view before rotating back inland. The burning village comes back into view in the distance, set against dark storm clouds. The scene captures the contrast between the serene coastal vista and the destruction inland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate, war-torn lowland that gradually ascends into a serene coastal vista. It begins in a muddy area scattered with debris and broken carts, following a samurai on horseback as they pass a calm pond and a burning village emitting thick black smoke under an overcast sky. As the horse transitions from the mud onto a dry hillside, the scene shifts to an ascent through tall golden vegetation and rocky outcrops, leaving the smoke of the village behind. The camera then reaches the cliff edge to reveal a breathtaking view of the ocean and traditional sailing ships visible through a distant haze. Finally, the view expands across jagged white cliffs before the camera pans back inland to contrast the peaceful seascape with the distant, burning village set against dark storm clouds.
